statement: In every magma, Equation 116 (`x = y * ((x * x) * z)`) implies Equation 1938 (`x = (y * (y * y)) * (z * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0134
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op y y)) (op z y))
